message: Node started: Objective: Maximize the sum of all elements in an N x N grid by applying at most K stamp placements. Input: Integers N, M, K representing grid dimension, number of available stamps, and maximum number of placements. An N x N grid of initial integers. M stamps, each being a 3 x 3 grid of integers. Constraints: Each placement consists of choosing a stamp index m (0 to M-1) and a top-left coordinate (i, j) such that the 3 x 3 stamp fits entirely within the N x N grid. When a stamp is placed, each cell (r, c) in the 3 x 3 area is updated: Grid[r][c] = (Grid[r][c] + Stamp[dr][dc]) mod P, where P = 998244353. Total placements L must satisfy 0 <= L <= K. Output: An integer L (number of placements). L lines, each containing three integers: m, i, j (stamp index and top-left position). Goal: Maximize the sum of all elements in the final N x N grid after L placements.
